title: Robot Property, Spel Class
syntax:
Property Robot As Integer

Default Value

If one or more robots exists, the default value for the first Spel instance is 1, otherwise it is 0. For all other Spel instances, the default value is 0.
description: Sets / returns the current robot number.
notes: On a system using multiple robots, use the Robot property to set the robot for subsequent robot related commands, such as motion commands.
see_also:
RobotModel

RobotType

Robot Example

VB Example:

m_spel.Robot = 2

If Not m_spel.MotorsOn Then

   m_spel.MotorsOn = True

End If

C# Example:

m_spel.Robot = 2;

if (!m_spel.MotorsOn)

   m_spel.MotorsOn = true;
examples:
m_spel.Robot = 2
If Not m_spel.MotorsOn Then
   m_spel.MotorsOn = True
End If
